BKAGG.name: Production: Manufacturing: Total Manufacturing for Germany
BKAGG.rationale: Production: Manufacturing: Total Manufacturing for Germany leads BKAGG material_per_unit by 2 month with Pearson -0.42 (rolling-24m stdev 0.02, p=0.0374).

BKAGG.name: Production, Sales, Work Started and Orders: Production Volume: Economic Activity: Manufacturing for Germany
BKAGG.rationale: Production, Sales, Work Started and Orders: Production Volume: Economic Activity: Manufacturing for Germany leads BKAGG material_per_unit by 3 month with Pearson 0.41 (rolling-24m stdev 0.04, p=0.0403).

BKAIZ.name: Swiss franc/Euro ECB reference exchange rate
BKAIZ.rationale: Swiss franc/Euro ECB reference exchange rate leads BKAIZ db2_margin by 2 month with Pearson -0.59 (rolling-24m stdev 0.15, p=4.41e-05).

BKAIZ.name: Consumer Price Index for All Urban Consumers: All Items in U.S. City Average
BKAIZ.rationale: Consumer Price Index for All Urban Consumers: All Items in U.S. City Average leads BKAIZ db2_margin by 2 month with Pearson 0.57 (rolling-24m stdev 0.16, p=7.35e-05).

BKAIZ.name: Producer Price Index by Commodity: Machinery and Equipment: Industrial Patterns
BKAIZ.rationale: Producer Price Index by Commodity: Machinery and Equipment: Industrial Patterns leads BKAIZ db2_margin by 3 month with Pearson 0.56 (rolling-24m stdev 0.15, p=0.00118).
